summary: The vulnerability is present in default deployments with authentication enabled. The PoC demonstrates the attack vector but full reproduction requires multi-user deployment configuration.
expected_security_impact: Unauthorized access to datasets belonging to other users through data_id enumeration, demonstrating complete lack of data isolation.
actual_observed_result: Reproduction not attempted because the vulnerability requires authentication to be enabled and multiple datasets from different users to exist, which requires specific deployment configuration.
verification_method: Authenticate as one user, enumerate data_id values, and access datasets created by other users to demonstrate unauthorized access.
limitations_or_blockers: Vulnerability requires authentication to be enabled in deployment
Requires multiple datasets from different users to exist
Requires knowledge of other users' data_id values (trivial enumeration)
Single-user deployments (common default) do not exhibit the vulnerability

reproduction.source_acquisition: run.sh clones the target repository on the host, checks out the pinned vulnerable commit, and mounts that checkout into the container at /target-repo.
